message:
feat(itertools): add chain, repeat, count, cycle, islice, zip_longest

- Implement codegen for itertools.chain (concatenate iterables)
- Implement codegen for itertools.repeat (repeat value n times)
- Implement codegen for itertools.count (infinite counter)
- Implement codegen for itertools.cycle (cycle through iterable)
- Implement codegen for itertools.islice (slice iterator)
- Implement codegen for itertools.zip_longest (zip with fill)
- Add stubs for product, permutations, combinations, groupby
